title: Sync docs and review workflow artifacts
description: Update required repository documentation after implementation so future agents and users understand the final model, pilot categories, validation commands, and deferred work. Keep workflow/spec artifacts trackable and do not ignore accepted planning outputs.
convergence: agents.md, README.md, Game content extraction/CLAUDE.md and .gitignore are synchronized per project rule.
Game content extraction/README.md reflects any user-facing behavior or data model changes.
Deferred scope is explicit: no full 20-category rewrite, no UI redesign, no history migration.
TODO_LIST.md reflects completed implementation tasks if executed.
git status is reviewed so unrelated changes are not staged or reverted.
